name: MIND
description: MIND personal knowledge graph for OpenClaw — true KG, 50+ AI models, MINDsense emotional intelligence, life management, CRM. Auto-recall injects relevant memories into context. Auto-capture extracts entities + relationships + emotional weights from each turn.

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Get your key at https://www.m-i-n-d.ai → Settings → Developer → Create API Key. Starts with mind_

apiKey.label: MIND API Key
apiKey.help: Get your key at https://www.m-i-n-d.ai → Settings → Developer. Use a SecretRef ({"source":"env","provider":"default","id":"MIND_API_KEY"}) or ${MIND_API_KEY} instead of storing the key directly.

baseUrl.label: MIND Base URL
baseUrl.help: Override only if self-hosting MIND. Default points to the MIND cloud.

userId.label: Default User ID
userId.help: User ID for scoping memories. Usually leave blank — your API key is already user-scoped.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically extract facts, entities, and emotional weights from each agent turn into the MIND knowledge graph.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories from the MIND knowledge graph before each agent turn.

topK.label: Top K Recall
topK.help: Maximum number of memories to inject per turn. Default: 10

searchThreshold.label: Search Threshold
searchThreshold.help: Minimum similarity score for hybrid search results (0-1). Default: 0.5

queryMode.label: Query Mode
queryMode.help: MIND knowledge graph query mode. Options: hybrid (default, recommended), mix, global, local, naive.

enableMindsense.label: MINDsense Emotional Encoding
enableMindsense.help: Use MINDsense to assign valence/arousal weights to captured memories. Higher emotional content gets deeper KG encoding.

enableLifeIntegration.label: Life Management Integration
enableLifeIntegration.help: Allow the agent to create MIND Life items (tasks, goals, calendar events) from conversations.

enableCrmLogging.label: CRM Activity Logging
enableCrmLogging.help: Allow the agent to log contacts and interaction history to MIND CRM.

skills.label: Agentic Memory Skills
skills.help: Enable skills-based memory protocols. Triage gates incoming facts, dream consolidates the KG periodically, emotional-encoding scores valence/arousal, graph-recall traverses entity relationships.
